About

🎸 Guitarist | 🎛️ Live Looping Artist | 🔊 Crafting full-band soundscapes

The Rig
Raspberry Pi Pedalboard
My latest creation. The brain is a Raspberry Pi 4 in a Desk Pi Pro case running Patchbox OS with MODEP. The interface is a Focusrite 2i4 2nd gen. The controls are a Linemaster USB footswitch and a USB Numpad. All powered by an Anker USB battery bank. LEARN MORE →
Telecaster
Me with my Telecaster practicing at the storage bins, 2014.
Fullerton
Me with my first guitar jamming in a friend's backyard, 2007.
[ PHOTO COMING SOON ]
Power & Transport
Bike-mobile. Battery powered. Self-contained. The logistics of the operation.
About Me

Musicians aren’t duplicating my rig for a straightforward reason: putting it together requires skills across three distinct technical disciplines.

To build what I have, a person must simultaneously act as an audio engineer, a hardware systems builder, and a software developer.

The vast majority of guitarists want plug-and-play simplicity. I want to explore sonic possibilities.

Booking & Inquiries

wcarlahlers@gmail.com
News
12-27-2025
Debut at Tanner Brewing
show

First gig at Tanner Brewing Company, Haddon Heights, NJ. Played two 1-hour sets. Gig was short notice -- got the offer at 1:30PM, showtime 7PM. Made up a social media post by 2PM and blasted out notifications. Good crowd, about a dozen people showed up on a Saturday night in the snow. Unfortunately forgot to hit record for one set.

Venue
Tanner Brewing Company, Haddon Heights NJ
Gear Used
Taylor Baby tuned down a whole step Carlo Robelli Electric (standard tuning) Line 6 DL4 2 Boss BCB-20 boards powered by 1x 18650 cell with buck booster to 9V Boss TU-2, NS-2, CS-3, OD-2, OC-3, CH-1, RC-2 Casio VL-1
9-27-2025
Collingswood Porchfest
show

First real outdoor show with the full rig. Brought my speaker, 4 channel mixing board, Carlo Robelli electric, full pedalboard and played for an hour straight. Had a lot of fun, great crowd!

Venue
Haddon Ave, Collingswood NJ
Gear Used
Carlo Robelli electric guitar Line 6 DL4 2 Boss BCB-20 boards powered by 1x 18650 cell with buck booster to 9V Boss TU-2, NS-2, CS-3, OD-2, OC-3, CH-1, RC-2 Danelectro modulation pedalboard with Tuna Melt Tremolo, Chicken Salad Vibrato, Hash Browns Flanger, Rocky Road Spinning Speaker, and PB&J Delay Casio VL-1 Yamaha DD-7
Setlist
  1. Nirvana - Smells Like Teen Spirit
  2. Gorillaz - Feel Good Inc.
  3. Pink Floyd - Breathe
  4. Pink Floyd - Time
  5. I Just Want My Soul (original song)
  6. Huey Lewis and the News - The Power of Love
  7. Radiohead - 15 Step
  8. Soul Coughing - The Idiot Kings
  9. Kate Bush - Cloudbusting
